issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' for a Main card effect, not 'Activated'

Effect completely mismatches card text. Should include: FlipLife action (look at and place Life cards), then KO action (up to 1 opponent Character with cost ≤5). Instead has DrawCard and TrashFromHand which are unrelated.
First action should be 'FlipLife' to handle the Life card manipulation, not 'DrawCard'
Second action should be 'KO' with filter for opponent Characters with cost ≤5, not 'TrashFromHand'
